query:
SELECT 
  p.id, 
  p.internalCode, 
  p.description,
  ps.crossdockingStock,
  pcst.productId,
  pcst.channelId,
  pcst.fullStock,
  pcst.crossStock,
  c.name as channelName
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON p.id = ps.productId
LEFT JOIN product_channel_stock_types pcst ON p.id = pcst.productId
LEFT JOIN channels c ON pcst.channelId = c.id
WHERE p.internalCode = 'BL001'
ORDER BY c.name;

  pcst.fullStock,
  pcst.crossStock,
  c.name as channelName
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_stock ps ON p.id = ps.productId
LEFT JOIN product_channel_stock_types pcst ON p.id = pcst.productId
LEFT JOIN channels c ON pcst.channelId = c.id
WHERE p.internalCode = 'BL001'
ORDER BY c.name;
